productDisplayName: Converse Men Diamond OX Black Shoes
description: Inspired by the ace athlete Chuck Taylor himself, these low top  shoes come with an improved comfort insole for better cushioned comfort for your feet. Team these bright diamond printed pair with form fitting denims and a monochrome tee for greater style. UpperCanvas upper with diamond print in black, blue and purpleCentral lacing system with a long tongue for comfortRubber overlay on the toe box to protect the toe regionReinforced overlay at the heel region for good  shoe structureMetal eyelets on the midfoot for ventilationMidsoleMidsole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe and heel region and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrainsShoe CareMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
